title: GripPaceNotes
description: A pace-note document covering one note set (one stage, one version). Storage-agnostic: use natural keys (rallyName + rallyDate + stageName + setVersion) for identity across parties; optional UUIDs are provided for implementations that need stable internal IDs. Pacenote field values are stored under each note's `fieldValues` object keyed by the field.key defined in the rally's accompanying field-config (see field-config.schema.json) — different rallies can use entirely different shorthand systems by shipping different field configs. App-specific data lives under namespaced `extensions` objects at the top level and on each contained object (rally, stage, set, paceNote); each app owns its own subtree, keyed by a kebab-case app slug.

extensions.description: App-specific namespaced data. Keys are app slugs (kebab-case recommended, e.g. 'grip-note'); values are objects owned by that app. Consumers should pass through unrecognized namespaces unchanged.

paceNote.description: A single pace-note call within a set. Position/meta lives at the top level; the actual shorthand values live in fieldValues keyed by the rally's field-config keys.

seq.description: Ordering within the note set. Also the canonical display sequence number — consumers that render a sequence column should use this.

indexOdo.description: Distance from stage start in metres.

fieldValues.description: Map of field.key → value. Values are primitives (string for chip selections / freetext / numeric-string distances, number for true numeric fields) or arrays of primitives when the field is repeatable. Field keys are defined by the accompanying field-config document.

createdAt.description: When this note was first captured during the recce drive. Distinct from set.recceDate (the document-level date for the whole recce pass) — per-note timestamps preserve intra-stage capture timing for replay/sync.

updatedAt.description: When this note was last modified after initial capture. Null if never edited.

schemaVersion.description: Version of the pace-note schema this document conforms to.

crew.description: Free-text identifier for the driving crew (driver / driver + co-driver / team name — producer's choice).

id.description: Optional stable identifier for implementations that need it. Not required for exchange; natural keys are authoritative.

crew.description: Free-text identifier for the crew on this specific note set (may differ from rally.crew if e.g. a co-driver tested an alternate set).

recceDate.description: Date the recce pass was made. ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD). Per-note timing lives on each paceNote's createdAt.

fieldConfig.description: The rally's field-config inlined into the pace-note document so a consumer can render the notes without a separate file fetch. When present, this inlined copy is authoritative for the document. Shape validates against field-config.schema.json.
